messages.content: Tell me more then one air cooler for i5 12400f just for gaming and under 3000 rupees and white in colour

Here are a few options of air coolers for the i5 12400F processor, suitable for gaming and costing under 3000 rupees while also being available in white:

1. Cooler Master Hyper 212 LED Turbo - This cooler offers excellent thermal performance and comes with a white LED fan to match your color preference. It is compatible with the i5 12400F and offers an affordable and reliable cooling solution.

2. DEEPCOOL GAMMAXX 400 White - This cooler features a white fan and heat sink, making it an aesthetically pleasing option for your gaming setup. It provides efficient cooling and is designed to fit the i5 12400F processor.

3. Antec C400 White - The Antec C400 White offers a sleek design with a white coating on both the fan and heat sink. It provides effective cooling while running quietly to enhance your gaming experience. It is compatible with the i5 12400F.

4. ID-COOLING SE-214 White - This cooler features a stylish white fan and heat sink design. It offers reliable cooling performance at an affordable price point. The ID-COOLING SE-214 is compatible with the i5 12400F and provides efficient heat dissipation.

Remember to check the specifications and compatibility of each cooler with your specific motherboard and case before making a purchase. Additionally, prices may vary, so it's a good idea to check multiple retailers for the most competitive pricing.
Tell me more then one air cooler for i5 12400f just for gaming and under 3000 rupees and white in colour compatible for this motherboard GIGABYTE B760M DS3H DDR4 (LGA 1700/

For the GIGABYTE B760M DS3H DDR4 motherboard and under 3000 rupees budget, here are a few options of white-colored air coolers suitable for gaming with the i5 12400F processor:

1. Deepcool GAMMAXX 300 - This cooler features a white fan and heat sink design. It comes with four copper heat pipes and provides efficient cooling for your i5 12400F. The Deepcool GAMMAXX 300 offers good performance at an affordable price.

2. Cooler Master Hyper H410R White Edition - This cooler includes a white fan and a compact low-profile heat sink. It is compatible with the i5 12400F and provides sufficient cooling for gaming. The Cooler Master Hyper H410R White Edition is known for its silent operation.

3. ID-COOLING SE-224-XT White - This cooler comes with a white fan and heat sink for a clean and stylish look. It is equipped with a 120mm PWM fan and provides efficient cooling performance. The ID-COOLING SE-224-XT White is compatible with the i5 12400F and offers good value for its price.

Remember to confirm the compatibility of the cooler with your specific motherboard and case before purchasing. Prices may vary, so it's recommended to check multiple retailers for the best deals.
Is ak400 compatible for this motherboard GIGABYTE B760M DS3H DDR4 (LGA 1700/

Yes, the AK400 is compatible with the GIGABYTE B760M DS3H DDR4 motherboard. The AK400 is a compact and affordable air cooler that provides efficient cooling for your processor. With its 92mm fan, it offers good performance within its price range. However, please note that the AK400 does not come in white color as per your preference.
Does it provides nice cooling while gaming

The AK400 provides decent cooling performance for standard usage and light gaming. However, if you are planning to engage in heavy gaming sessions or overclocking, you may want to consider a more powerful cooler with larger fans or additional heat pipes for better heat dissipation. While the AK400 can handle moderate gaming, it may struggle to keep temperatures low under heavy loads. It's always recommended to prioritize the cooling needs of your specific processor and usage requirements to ensure optimal performance and longevity.
I don't have to overclock but I have to play 1080 full hd game play can he handel that

Yes, the AK400 should be capable of handling 1080p full HD gameplay without any issues. It provides sufficient cooling for the i5 12400F processor under regular gaming loads. While it may not offer the same level of cooling performance as higher-end coolers, it should be adequate for moderate gaming sessions at 1080p resolution. As long as your system has proper airflow and the case is well-ventilated, the AK400 should be able to maintain acceptable temperatures during gameplay.
So what will be the temperature while playing DBZ kakarot or call of duty warzone or fortnight

The specific temperature of your i5 12400F while playing games like Dragon Ball Z: Kakarot, Call of Duty Warzone, or Fortnite can vary depending on various factors such as ambient temperature, case airflow, and specific gameplay settings. It's difficult to give an exact temperature without testing it on your specific system.

However, with the AK400 cooler and assuming a well-ventilated case, you can expect the CPU temperature to be within acceptable ranges during gaming. Generally, for gaming with a non-overclocked processor, it is recommended to keep the CPU temperature under 80-85°C for optimal performance and longevity. The AK400 should be able to keep the temperatures within this range under normal gaming loads.

It's always a good idea to monitor your CPU temperatures using software like HWMonitor or MSI Afterburner while gaming to ensure that they remain within safe limits. If you notice that temperatures are consistently higher than desired, you may want to consider additional case fans or a more robust cooling solution.
So what you prefer for cooler

For the i5 12400F processor and under 3000 rupees budget, considering your preference for a white-colored cooler, and compatibility with the GIGABYTE B760M DS3H DDR4 motherboard, I would recommend the Deepcool GAMMAXX 400 White Edition.

The Deepcool GAMMAXX 400 White Edition offers efficient cooling performance and comes with a white fan and heat sink design, which will complement your desired aesthetic. It features four heat pipes and a 120mm PWM fan to provide effective heat dissipation, even during gaming sessions.

Overall, the Deepcool GAMMAXX 400 White Edition is a reliable and budget-friendly option that should meet your cooling needs for gaming with the i5 12400F processor.
Well what about Ag500

I'm sorry, but I couldn't find any specific information about an "Ag500" cooler that is compatible with the i5 12400F processor and within the specified budget. It's possible that you may have mentioned a model that doesn't exist or one that is not well-known.

If you have any other cooler options or if there's a different name or brand you were referring to, I would be happy to provide more information on its compatibility and performance.
Can you show me a picture of GAMMAXX 400 white edition

As an AI text-based model, I'm unable to directly show you images. However, you can easily find images of the Deepcool GAMMAXX 400 White Edition by conducting a quick internet search. Simply search for "Deepcool GAMMAXX 400 White Edition" and navigate to the image results to get a visual representation of the cooler. Additionally, you can visit the official Deepcool website or online retailers to view product images and specifications of the GAMMAXX 400 White Edition.
Can you tell me the price

I'm sorry, but as an AI language model, I don't have real-time access to current prices. Product prices can vary depending on the region, retailer, and any ongoing promotions or discounts. I recommend checking with local computer hardware retailers or online marketplaces to get the most up-to-date pricing information for the Deepcool GAMMAXX 400 White Edition or any other coolers you may be interested in.
Ok then tell me the temperature while playing the games I said  earlier

While the specific temperature of your i5 12400F processor while playing games like Dragon Ball Z: Kakarot, Call of Duty Warzone, or Fortnite can vary depending on various factors, a general range of acceptable temperatures for gaming with this processor is typically under 80-85°C for optimal performance and longevity.

However, it's important to note that temperature readings can fluctuate based on factors like ambient temperature, case airflow, cooling solution, and in-game settings. Monitoring software like HWMonitor or MSI Afterburner can help you keep an eye on your CPU temperatures during gameplay and ensure they remain within safe limits.

If you notice that temperatures are consistently reaching higher levels, such as approaching or exceeding 85°C, it could indicate that your cooling solution may need improvement. In such cases, you might consider upgrading to a more powerful cooling solution or improving the case airflow by adding additional fans or optimizing cable management.
